detail.add_ai_title: AI suggests panels from a journal entry, note, or review
detail.archived_hint: Archived story — no panel generation possible until reactivated.
detail.confirm_remove_panel: Remove panel from the story? The image stays in your Picture gallery and can be deleted there.

picker.section_hint: Your face is required. Body-ref and up to {max} costume photos are optional — click an image or the ✕ to remove it.
picker.face_required_title: Face-ref is required — cannot be removed
picker.garment_picker_title: Pick a costume from the wardrobe
picker.garment_picker_empty_html: No more garments available — upload some in /wardrobe.
picker.no_face_alert_html: No face photo in this space. Upload one in Profile → Images — without a face ref no comic.
picker.body_tip: Tip: a body ref helps when the comic shows full-body panels.

character_detail.empty_variants_hint_html: Click + More variants in the top right to generate the first 4.
character_detail.archived_hint: Archived character — no variant generation possible until reactivated.
character_detail.confirm_remove_variant: Remove variant from this character? The image stays in your Picture gallery and can be deleted there.
